nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
VISUAL STYLE: Arri Alexa, static, shallow depth of field, Rembrandt lighting, teal and gold colour grade, film grain, photorealistic.

ENVIRONMENT: Deserted beach at dusk. Fine sand, scattered driftwood. Gentle breeze. Ambient sound: distant ocean waves, seagulls.

CHARACTERS: A dancer. Lean build, tanned skin, long dark hair. Wearing a flowing linen dress. Confident, playful demeanor.

ACTION BREAKDOWN:
Shot 1 — 4s. CS — RA, Dolly forward slowly as she turns her back to the camera playfully and lifts her skirt to show her buttocks and g-string panties.
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
